message:
chore(beads): update issue tracker — bd-1bp in_progress, bd-3dx4 priority escalation

- bd-1bp (CLI Inspect Command Tests): open → in_progress
- bd-3dx4 (OIDC RS256/JWKS misrepresentation): priority 1 → 0 (critical),
  add notes explaining the risk of advertising RS256/JWKS when only HMAC exists

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
